## FIRST ACTION EVERY SESSION тАФ Canary Check

```python
import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect(host='37.27.169.232', port=5432, dbname='postgres',
                        user='postgres', password='Anamaria@2026', connect_timeout=10)
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(norm_amount) FROM raw.ncboe_donations WHERE cluster_id=372171')
r = cur.fetchone()
assert r[0]==147 and abs(float(r[1])-332631.30)<1, f'CANARY FAIL: {r}'
print(f'CANARY OK: {r[0]} / {r[1]}')
conn.close()
```
**If canary fails тАФ STOP. Do not touch the database. Relay to Nexus immediately.**
